---
name: Add dummy-data smoke test
about: Expand the no-data smoke test so new users can validate the repository faster.
title: "add dummy-data smoke test"
labels: ["enhancement", "testing"]
---

## Goal
Make first-run validation possible without medical data.

## Suggested scope
- [ ] verify more public entry points
- [ ] emit clearer JSON output for CI
- [ ] document expected artifacts in the landing README

## Why this matters
A visible smoke test lowers the barrier to trying the repository.
